HGSS.737.0004:
If you’ve become a bit of a fanatic
about battles, I’m the guy who can\r
teach your Pokémon all kinds of moves.\f
May I teach your Pokémon
moves in exchange for BP? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0005:
Oh, how unlucky! There’s no move I can
teach that Pokémon!\f
HGSS.737.0006:
Oh, what an unhappy thing!
You don’t have enough BP!\f
HGSS.737.0007:
Giving up on teaching [0100,0000,0000]
a move!\r
That’s what you want, right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0008:
[0100,0000,0000] wants to learn the move
[0106,0001,0000]...\f
But [0100,0000,0000] already knows four
moves, so it can’t!\f
Forget a move so that [0106,0001,0000]
can be learned?[0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0009:
[0106,0002,0000] will be forgotten.
That’s OK, right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0010:
So you want to give up on
[0106,0001,0000], am I right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0016:
If you’ve poured your whole life into
Pokémon battles, I’m the guy who can\r
teach your Pokémon all kinds of moves.\f
May I teach your Pokémon
moves in exchange for BP? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0017:
Oh no!
There’s no move I can teach that\r
Pokémon!\f
HGSS.737.0018:
Oh no!
You don’t have enough BP!\f
HGSS.737.0019:
Quit trying to teach [0100,0000,0000] new
moves? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0020:
[0100,0000,0000] wants to learn the move
[0106,0001,0000]...\f
But [0100,0000,0000] already knows four
moves!\f
Forget a move so that [0106,0001,0000]
can be learned?[0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0022:
So you want to give up on
[0106,0001,0000], am I right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0027: Well then! See you next time!
HGSS.737.0028:
If you’ve poured your heart and soul
into Pokémon battles, I’m the guy who\r
can teach your Pokémon all kinds\r
of moves.\f
May I teach your Pokémon
moves in exchange for BP? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0029:
Oh... There’s no move I can
teach that Pokémon!\f
HGSS.737.0030:
How sad...
You don’t have enough BP!\f
HGSS.737.0031:
Giving up on teaching [0100,0000,0000]
a move, right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0032:
[0100,0000,0000] wants to learn the move
[0106,0001,0000]...\f
But [0100,0000,0000] already knows four
moves!\f
Forget a move so that [0106,0001,0000]
can be learned? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0033:
[0106,0002,0000] will be forgotten.
Do I have that right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0034:
So you want to give up on
[0106,0001,0000], right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.737.0039:
Until next time!
Come back whenever you’ve got\r
Battle Points to spend!
